title: Stephens Precision
description: Stephens Precision, Inc. is a versatile HUBZone manufacturing facility in Vermont, specializing in the machining of mechanical assemblies, components, and tooling for aerospace, defense, commercial, and research sectors. As a Woman-Owned Small Business, they offer solutions from prototype to volume production, emphasizing lean manufacturing and cost control through various programs. The company prides itself on achieving 100% quality and delivery ratings from major clients like Boeing and GE Aviation. With a commitment to quality and a skilled workforce, they provide precision machined parts and a wide range of materials, ensuring strong partnerships with their clients.
